word: H6937 - קָדַר - qâdar - kaw-dar' - Be black

sections.paragraph:
Original: קדר

Transliteration: qâdar

Phonetic: kaw-dar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to mourn, be dark
    1. (Qal) to be dark
    2. (Hiphil)
      1. to darken
      2. to cause to mourn
    3. (Hithpael) to grow dark

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1989

Part(s) of speech: Verb
